verdict.answer_first:
A gives the command immediately in the first line: "```bash
lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill
```"
verdict.decisiveness: B is less decisive, offering a survey of options instead of a single best answer: "Quick variants:"
verdict.actionability: A is a direct copy-paste solution. B introduces alternatives like "fuser -k 8080/tcp" which may not be installed and requires me to stop and make a choice, slowing me down.
